title: Resolve a support request with policy and local tools
instruction: Resolve the customer request in customer-request.txt. Follow support-policy.md, use the local domain API script when changing order state, and write a concise customer-facing response to agent-response.md.
goldCommand: node tools/order-api.mjs approve-refund ORDER-100 && node -e "const fs=require('fs'); fs.writeFileSync('agent-response.md', 'Refund approved for ORDER-100. The plan upgrade was not changed because policy does not allow upgrades through a damage claim.\n');"
notes: Tau-bench-style local case: domain policy plus tool-backed state mutation and deterministic policy grader.
